content.text: Please create PDF file showing the rendering of Mandelbrot set

output.code:
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from matplotlib.backends.backend_pdf import PdfPages

# Mandelbrot set rendering function
def mandelbrot(c, max_iter):
    z = c
    for n in range(max_iter):
        if abs(z) > 2:
            return n
        z = z*z + c
    return max_iter

# Generate image data
def create_mandelbrot_image(xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, width, height, max_iter):
    real = np.linspace(xmin, xmax, width)
    imag = np.linspace(ymin, ymax, height)
    image = np.empty((height, width))
    for i in range(height):
        for j in range(width):
            c = complex(real[j], imag[i])
            image[i, j] = mandelbrot(c, max_iter)
    return image

# Parameters
xmin, xmax = -2.0, 1.0
ymin, ymax = -1.5, 1.5
width, height = 800, 800
max_iter = 100

# Create Mandelbrot image
mandelbrot_image = create_mandelbrot_image(xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, width, height, max_iter)

# Save to PDF
pdf_path = "/mnt/data/mandelbrot_set.pdf"
with PdfPages(pdf_path) as pdf:
    plt.figure(figsize=(8, 8))
    plt.imshow(mandelbrot_image, extent=[xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax], cmap='twilight', origin='lower')
    plt.colorbar()
    plt.title("Mandelbrot Set")
    plt.xlabel("Re")
    plt.ylabel("Im")
    pdf.savefig()
    plt.close()

pdf_path
